languages.text:
+20% dodge against enemies closer than 10 cells.
Shots from sniper rifles are autohits.

+20% dodge against enemies closer than 10 cells.

languages.text: The wearer has +20% {g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}dodge{/g} against enemies within a 10-cell radius. All attacks made by the wearer with a sniper rifle are automatic {g|Encyclopedia:HitSequenceGlossary}hits{/g}.

traits.locale_text: The wearer has +20% dodge against enemies within a 10-cell radius. All attacks made by the wearer with a sniper rifle are automatic hits.

languages.text: Персонаж получает +20% к {g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}уклонению{/g} от противников в радиусе 10 клеток. Все атаки персонажа из снайперской винтовки автоматически {g|Encyclopedia:HitSequenceGlossary}попадают{/g} в цель.

languages.text: El portador tiene +20 % de {g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}esquiva{/g} contra enemigos en un radio de 10 casillas. Todos los ataques que el portador lance con un rifle de francotirador son {g|Encyclopedia:HitSequenceGlossary}impactos{/g} automáticos.

languages.text: Der Träger hat +20 % {g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}Ausweichen{/g} gegen Feinde in einem Radius von 10 Feldern. Alle Angriffe des Trägers mit einem Scharfschützengewehr sind automatisch {g|Encyclopedia:HitSequenceGlossary}Treffer{/g}.

languages.text: Le porteur a +20 % d'{g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}esquive{/g} contre les ennemis dans un rayon de 10 cases. Toutes ses attaques au fusil de sniper {g|Encyclopedia:HitSequenceGlossary}touchent{/g} automatiquement leurs cibles.

languages.text: Giyen kişi, 10 hücrelik yarıçap içindeki düşmanlara karşı +%20 {g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}kaçınma{/g} değerine sahiptir. Giyen kişinin nişancı tüfeği ile yaptığı tüm saldırılar, otomatikman {g|Encyclopedia:HitSequenceGlossary}vurur{/g}.

traits.locale_text: Giyen kişi, 10 hücrelik yarıçap içindeki düşmanlara karşı +%20 {g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}kaçınma{/g} değerine sahiptir. Giyen kişinin nişancı tüfeği ile yaptığı tüm saldırılar, otomatikman {g|Encyclopedia:HitSequenceGlossary}vurur{/g}.

languages.text: 装备者对10格内敌人的{g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}闪避{/g}提高20%。装备者使用狙击步枪进行的所有攻击必定{g|Encyclopedia:HitSequenceGlossary}命中{/g}。
languages.original_text: The wearer has +20% {g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}dodge{/g} against enemies within a 10-cell radius. All attacks made by the wearer with a sniper rifle are automatic {g|Encyclopedia:HitSequenceGlossary}hits{/g}.

traits.locale_text: 装备者对10格内敌人的{g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}闪避{/g}提高20%。装备者使用狙击步枪进行的所有攻击必定{g|Encyclopedia:HitSequenceGlossary}命中{/g}。

languages.text: 敵の攻撃に対して、10マス以内の範囲で+20%の{g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}回避{/g}率を得る。スナイパーライフルによる攻撃は自動的に{g|Encyclopedia:HitSequenceGlossary}命中{/g}する。
languages.original_text: The wearer has +20% {g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}dodge{/g} against enemies within a 10-cell radius. All attacks made by the wearer with a sniper rifle are automatic {g|Encyclopedia:HitSequenceGlossary}hits{/g}.

traits.locale_text: 敵の攻撃に対して、10マス以内の範囲で+20%の{g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}回避{/g}率を得る。スナイパーライフルによる攻撃は自動的に{g|Encyclopedia:HitSequenceGlossary}命中{/g}する。
